name: Festivia butterfly
description:
The Fun and beloved Queen of Mewni at another one of her parties

Artist: gogola star

You can be anything you want: a monster, a mewman, a peasant, a knight, a king or just a normal human, it's up to you.

I didn't test the bot. from now on I will always make a NSFW version and a SFW version of the bots of the queens of Mewni

Please give me feedback on my bots, so I can improve them :)
creator: haz br
